/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/UniversalVideoDownloader_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/platformutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/toolmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalVideoDownloader.dir/url_extractor.cpp.o -o UniversalVideoDownloader.app/Contents/MacOS/UniversalVideoDownloader -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
